tasks.label: Start local server (port 8080)
tasks.command: if curl -sf --max-time 2 http://127.0.0.1:8080/ >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Server already running on http://localhost:8080'; else lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; python3 -m http.server 8080 & sleep 1; echo 'Started server on http://localhost:8080'; fi

tasks.label: Stop local server (port 8080)
tasks.command: lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'Stopped any process on port 8080'
